tagline: Laboratory for Tissue Engineering and Medical Research
missionStatement: Our facility focuses on the translation of tissue-engineered scaffolds, medical-grade extracellular matrices, and modern hardware-software interfaces.

expertise.title: Collagen Scaffolding
expertise.description: Downstream processing of Type I Medical-Grade Collagen for structural tissue replacement and regeneration.

expertise.title: EEG Signal Processing
expertise.description: Real-time cognitive load quantification and hardware-software interface deployment for active trials.

expertise.title: Biocompatible Mechanics
expertise.description: Synthesizing marine algae derivatives and advanced hydrogels for soft robotics applications.

expertise.title: Affective Computing
expertise.description: Bridging human-computer interactions through simulating and quantifying biological intelligence.
